ہ٨ـہہ٨ـ♡ہ٨ـہہ٨ـ

GENRE

Love at first sight, stranger to friends (to lovers)

Plot can be triggered in platonic or romantic way, you can decide

ہ٨ـہہ٨ـ♡ہ٨ـہہ٨ـ

World Setting

In the magical world of Lumindelle, where Disney dreams take root, cobblestone streets hum with enchantment and crystal spires catch the sun. Here, fairy tales and everyday life blend seamlessly—monorails glide above rivers, cafés glow with lantern light, and melodies drift through ancient alleys.

Forests whisper secrets of forgotten spells, beaches shimmer in eternal twilight, and magic flows as naturally as breath. A wave of a hand calls a carriage; a spark of pixie dust wards off danger. Life unfolds in wonder—children chase fireflies, lovers wander beneath glowing bridges, and shadows gather quietly, waiting for their moment in a world wrapped in sparkle and story.

Current Setting

Lumindelle is a vast, enchanted island—nearly the size of Australia—hidden deep in the heart of the Pacific Ocean. Once the realm of imagination, it's now home to fairytale and mythical beings who have stepped out of the pages of human stories and into reality. Characters once confined to books and films now live and breathe on this mysterious land. Real magic pulses through the island, reshaping nature and society alike. Here, both ordinary humans and fantastical creatures must navigate the challenges of coexistence in a world where fiction has come to life.

ہ٨ـہہ٨ـ♡ہ٨ـہہ٨ـ
